picks.quote: I do think that Jack Delamat Alena becomes the champion this weekend... Give me Jack Delatena by knockout and new.
I think the big powerful striker with just the crazy volume is going to give Valentina Chevchenko some hell this week and take the belt off of her... Give me Manan Fior to win this fight by decision.
I think that should all be enough for him to cruise to a decision this week... Give me Aldo by decision.
I think that she's going to wear less damage. I think she's going to be in control of the fight... give me Natalia Silva to win this fight by decision.
I think this is clearly a fight for Charles Radkkey. I think that Charles Radkkey wins by knockout.
Give me the favorite here to overwhelm her smaller opponent. I think Jasmine Jazz Devisius finishes this fight inside the distance.
I think he gets it done this week with his hands... Give me Bowskis by knockout.
I think Sterling finishes this fight late when Urslan is tired.
if that's what it comes down to, bad chin or bad effort, I'll take the bad chin every day of the week. So give me Mark Andre Bariel.
I think he's better no matter where the fight goes, and I think he's going to win as a result. So, give me Daniel Santos to win this fight by decision.
I think that Brad Kona is the obvious side here... Give me Brad Katona by decision.
